steps.title: Substitute the y-coordinate of the intersection point
steps.content:
The intersection point is $(q, 19)$ with $y = 19$. Substitute into both equations:

Equation 1: $-x - 19w = -337$
Equation 2: $2x - 19w = 47$

steps.title: Eliminate x and solve for w
steps.content:
Multiply equation 1 by 2:
$$-2x - 38w = -674$$
Add to equation 2 to eliminate $x$:
$$-2x - 38w + 2x - 19w = -674 + 47$$
$$-57w = -627$$
$$w = 11$$
